data.body: Done definition update (2026-04-26 scope expansion, epic 3aaa-0238 SC8/SC9/SC10): E2E PR-lifecycle test must verify all 11 required checks (was 4 + LLM review = 5; now lint, format, tests, LLM review, validate-ci, linux-bash4, macos-bash3, alpine-busybox, pipefail-strict) appear on the test PR and block merge until green.
